headline: A Look At Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) Valuation After Strong Q4 Beat And Confident 2026 Guidance
summary: Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (WAB) is back in focus after reporting a fourth quarter that topped earnings and revenue expectations, paired with guidance for 2026 that highlights double-digit adjusted EPS growth and record cash generation. See our latest analysis for Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies. Despite the strong fourth quarter update and confident 2026 outlook, the share price has eased recently, with a 7.13% 1 month share price return decline. This comes even as the 1 year...

headline: 3 Stocks From the Transport Equipment & Leasing Industry to Watch
summary: Headwinds, including inflation, tariff-related tensions, and lingering supply-chain disruptions, hurt the Zacks Transportation - Equipment and Leasing industry. WAB, AER and AL are likely to stand out.
